message:
fix: add optimistic concurrency control to AdvanceToNextStep TOCTOU race (bd-e1ev)

AdvanceToNextStep previously read molecule progress, identified the next ready
step, and claimed it without a transaction. In multi-agent Gas Town, two agents
closing different steps could both identify and try to claim the same next step.

Fix: wrap the claim phase in a transaction that re-reads the step status before
updating. If another agent already claimed the step, fall back to the next ready
step in the list. Also collect all ready steps (not just the first) to enable
this fallback behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
